SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation

Class TextualJMLConstruct

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.pretranslation.TextualJMLConstruct
Direct Known Subclasses:
TextualJMLAssertStatement, TextualJMLClassAxiom, TextualJMLClassInv, TextualJMLDepends, TextualJMLFieldDecl, TextualJMLInitially, TextualJMLLoopSpec, TextualJMLMergePointDecl, TextualJMLMethodDecl, TextualJMLModifierList, TextualJMLRepresents, TextualJMLSetStatement, TextualJMLSpecCase
public abstract class TextualJMLConstruct extends Object
Objects of this type represent the various JML specification constructs in textual, unprocessed form.

  • Method Details

    • isLoopContract

      public final boolean isLoopContract()
      Returns:
      true if and only if this is a loop contract.
      See Also:
      • LoopContract

    • setLoopContract

      public final void setLoopContract(boolean loopContract)
      Parameters:
      loopContract - boolean to identify contract as loop contract
      See Also:
      • isLoopContract()

    • getModifiers

      public final ImmutableList<JMLModifier> getModifiers()

    • getLocation

      public Location getLocation()
      Return the approximate location of this construct. This is usually the position of the specification line parsed first. Implementations can set it using setPosition or addGeneric.

    • setPosition

      protected void setPosition(PositionedString ps)
      Sets the approximate position of this construct when first called with a valid position. The approximate position can still be changed while it is undefined. Also set source file name if known.
      Parameters:
      ps - set position of the construct

    • setPosition

      protected void setPosition(ParserRuleContext ps)

    • setPosition

      protected void setPosition(LabeledParserRuleContext ps)
